en: Behold, the LORD will empty the earth and make it desolate, and he will twist its surface and scatter its inhabitants.
zh: 看哪！耶和華使大地空虛，變為荒涼； 他必翻轉地面，使地上的居民四散。

en: And it shall be, as with the people, so with the priest; as with the slave, so with his master; as with the maid, so with her mistress; as with the buyer, so with the seller; as with the lender, so with the borrower; as with the creditor, so with the debtor.
zh: 人民和祭司， 僕人和主人， 婢女和主母， 購買的和販賣的， 借給人和向人借的， 放債的和借債的，全都一樣被分散。

en: The earth shall be utterly empty and utterly plundered; for the LORD has spoken this word.
zh: 大地必完全倒空， 被劫掠淨盡， 這話是耶和華說的。

en: The earth mourns and withers; the world languishes and withers; the highest people of the earth languish.
zh: 大地悲哀衰殘， 世界零落衰殘， 地上居高位的人也衰敗了。

en: The earth lies defiled under its inhabitants; for they have transgressed the laws, violated the statutes, broken the everlasting covenant.
zh: 大地被其上的居民玷污， 因為他們犯了律法， 違了律例， 背了永遠的約。

en: Therefore a curse devours the earth, and its inhabitants suffer for their guilt; therefore the inhabitants of the earth are scorched, and few men are left.
zh: 因此，大地被咒詛吞滅， 地上的居民要承擔懲罰。 因此，地上的居民被焚燒， 剩下的人很少。

en: The wine mourns, the vine languishes, all the merry-hearted sigh.
zh: 新酒悲哀， 葡萄樹衰殘， 心中歡樂的，變為歎息。

en: The mirth of the tambourines is stilled, the noise of the jubilant has ceased, the mirth of the lyre is stilled.
zh: 擊鼓的喜樂止息， 宴樂者的喧嘩停止， 彈琴的喜樂也止息了。

en: No more do they drink wine with singing; strong drink is bitter to those who drink it.
zh: 他們不得再飲酒唱歌； 喝濃酒的，必覺苦味。

en: The wasted city is broken down; every house is shut up so that none can enter.
zh: 混亂的城破毀了， 各家關門閉戶，使人不得進入。

en: There is an outcry in the streets for lack of wine; all joy has grown dark; the gladness of the earth is banished.
zh: 有人在街上因無酒呼喊； 一切喜樂都已過去， 地上的喜樂都消逝了。

en: Desolation is left in the city; the gates are battered into ruins.
zh: 城門所剩下的只有荒涼， 城門被撞得粉碎。

en: For thus it shall be in the midst of the earth among the nations, as when an olive tree is beaten, as at the gleaning when the grape harvest is done.
zh: 在地上的萬民， 都像搖過的橄欖樹， 又像被摘取完了的葡萄樹，剩下無幾。

en: They lift up their voices, they sing for joy; over the majesty of the LORD they shout from the west.
zh: 剩餘的人必高聲歡呼， 在西邊的，要宣揚耶和華的威嚴。

en: Therefore in the east give glory to the LORD; in the coastlands of the sea, give glory to the name of the LORD, the God of Israel.
zh: 在東方那邊的，要榮耀耶和華， 要在沿海的眾島上， 榮耀耶和華以色列 神的名。

en: From the ends of the earth we hear songs of praise, of glory to the Righteous One. But I say, "I waste away, I waste away. Woe is me! For the traitors have betrayed, with betrayal the traitors have betrayed."
zh: 我們聽見從地極有歌聲唱著： “榮耀歸於義人。” 我卻說：“我消瘦了，我消瘦了！我有禍了！ 詭詐的仍在行詭詐， 詭詐的仍在大行詭詐。”

en: Terror and the pit and the snare are upon you, O inhabitant of the earth!
zh: 地上的居民哪！ 恐懼、陷坑和網羅，都臨近你們！

en: He who flees at the sound of the terror shall fall into the pit, and he who climbs out of the pit shall be caught in the snare. For the windows of heaven are opened, and the foundations of the earth tremble.
zh: 那逃避恐懼聲音的，必墮入陷坑； 那從陷坑裡上來的，必被網羅纏住； 因為天上的窗都開了，地的根基也震動了。

en: The earth is utterly broken, the earth is split apart, the earth is violently shaken.
zh: 大地全然破壞， 盡都崩裂， 大大震動。

en: The earth staggers like a drunken man; it sways like a hut; its transgression lies heavy upon it, and it falls, and will not rise again.
zh: 大地東歪西倒，像個醉酒的人， 又搖來搖去，像座草棚； 大地被其上的罪孽重重壓著， 以致塌陷，不能再起來。

en: On that day the LORD will punish the host of heaven, in heaven, and the kings of the earth, on the earth.
zh: 到那日， 耶和華必在高天之上懲罰天上的眾軍， 又在地上懲罰地上的列王。

en: They will be gathered together as prisoners in a pit; they will be shut up in a prison, and after many days they will be punished.
zh: 他們必被聚集， 像囚犯被聚集在牢獄裡一般； 他們要被關在監牢中， 多日以後，他們要被懲罰。

en: Then the moon will be confounded and the sun ashamed, for the LORD of hosts reigns on Mount Zion and in Jerusalem, and his glory will be before his elders.
zh: 那時，月亮必蒙羞，日頭要慚愧， 因為萬軍之耶和華必在錫安山，在耶路撒冷作王； 並且在他子民的眾長老面前，大有榮耀。
